name: team-offlight
description: Claude Code plugins by Team Offlight

plugins.name: dual
plugins.description: Multi-model collaboration — Claude + Codex for fact verification, plan review, and code review

plugins.name: spawn
plugins.description: Spawn a new Claude Code session in a Warp terminal tab

plugins.name: ulp
plugins.description: Ultimate Loop Planning — 6-stage critique-based planning loop

plugins.name: session-commit
plugins.description: Commit only files changed in the current session — no git diff/status needed

plugins.name: my-knowledge-base
plugins.description: Compound your knowledge across sessions — tracks what you know, what you're learning, with verified assessments

plugins.name: manage-skill
plugins.description: Manage Claude Code extensions (skills, hooks, agents) — create, modify, rename, delete with deployment pipeline

plugins.name: tasklist
plugins.description: Browse and load saved Claude Code Task Lists

plugins.name: notify-on-stop
plugins.description: Play a sound and show a macOS notification when Claude stops responding
